com.jsyn.util

Class PseudoRandom

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.jsyn.util.PseudoRandom

  • public class PseudoRandom
extends java.lang.Object
    Pseudo-random numbers using predictable and fast linear-congruential method.
    Author:
    Phil Burk (C) 2009 Mobileer Inc Translated from 'C' to Java by Lisa Tolenti.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PseudoRandom()
      Create an instance of SynthRandom.

      Create an instance of PseudoRandom.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int choose(int range) 
      int getSeed() 
      double nextRandomDouble()
      Returns the next random double from -1.0 to 1.0
      int nextRandomInteger()
      Calculate random 32 bit number using linear-congruential method.
      double random()
      Returns the next random double from 0.0 to 1.0
      void setSeed(int seed)
